title: Published conformance suite for the RepoPact standard

acceptance_criteria.text: Promote tests/fixtures/{valid,invalid} into a versioned, documented conformance suite with a manifest mapping each fixture to the spec rule / invariant it exercises and its expected validator outcome (accept / reject-with-reason).

A conformance runner (scripts/run_conformance.py) runs an arbitrary RepoPact implementation against the suite and reports pass/fail per case; wired into CI so the suite cannot silently drift from the validator.
CONFORMANCE.md describes how a third-party implementation claims 'RepoPact <spec-version> conformant', tied to VERSION; all gates (validate, unittest, dashboard, spec, conformance) pass.
